expectations.evidence: Queried zmluvy for ICO 17317282, found 8 contracts with UVO links and 6 without
Found 6 contracts >50K EUR without UVO links totaling 10,011,076 EUR (34% of value)
Each contract without UVO flagged with 'Bez UVO zaznamu' at DANGER severity
Lists all 6: Zive namestie 7M, Zilina 1.56M, Kanianka 565K, Krasnany 488K, Nizny Klatov 336K, Raca 55K
